diagrams.title: File Opening Process in C
diagrams.description: Shows the flow from calling fopen() to getting a valid FILE pointer
elements: fopen() attempts to open file on disk
Success: Returns FILE pointer to structure
Program uses FILE pointer for I/O operations
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how files are opened and the importance of checking return value

diagrams.title: File Modes Comparison Chart
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of all file modes with their behaviors
elements: r: Read only, file must exist
Binary variants: rb, wb, ab, r+b, w+b, a+b
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for choosing correct file mode based on requirement

diagrams.title: File Position Pointer Movement
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how the file position pointer moves during sequential read operations
diagrams.purpose: Understanding sequential access and position management in files
